data.name: King of Queendoms
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關於此遊戲



Once upon a time in a continent far away existed a land where it is the women, not the men, who were the dominant gender. Despite this land’s fruitful fields and robust resources, it was constantly in conflict as there was a great rivalry between the three most powerful Queens.

The rivalry was so heated and intense that the scent of war constantly loomed over all the lands. For this reason a great and wise mage called Elvira has come up with an ingenious plan to bring peace to the entire continent and for this plan to work she needs a young and strong knight.



Will you be that knight?

Will you offer her your sword?

Will you rise up to the occasion?

Will you find a wonderful waifu along the way?

Only you can find out! Play King of Queendoms!



  • A hilarious and sexy fantasy storyline
  • Anime characters
  • Sexy Queens to allure
  • An epic and orchestral soundtrack
data.about_the_game:
Once upon a time in a continent far away existed a land where it is the women, not the men, who were the dominant gender. Despite this land’s fruitful fields and robust resources, it was constantly in conflict as there was a great rivalry between the three most powerful Queens.

The rivalry was so heated and intense that the scent of war constantly loomed over all the lands. For this reason a great and wise mage called Elvira has come up with an ingenious plan to bring peace to the entire continent and for this plan to work she needs a young and strong knight.



Will you be that knight?

Will you offer her your sword?

Will you rise up to the occasion?

Will you find a wonderful waifu along the way?

Only you can find out! Play King of Queendoms!



  • A hilarious and sexy fantasy storyline
  • Anime characters
  • Sexy Queens to allure
  • An epic and orchestral soundtrack
data.short_description: King of Queendoms is a comedic adult visual novel set in a magical fantasy land. Play as a knight quested to bring order and peace to the rising political and diplomatic tensions across the lands.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 2Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1.66 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
